messages.body: I'm busy right now, so can you please leave your phone number and a brief message? I will call you back. Thank you. I'm busy right now, so can you please leave your phone number and a brief message? I'm busy right now, s…
Hi, this is Sabah speaking. I'm busy right now, so can you please leave your phone number and a brief message? I will call you back. Thank you.
Hi, this is Sabah speaking. I'm busy right now, so can you please leave your phone number?
It will be refunded this coming week.

I wanted to update you on your request. I've already escalated this matter to our finance team and the head of client experience. They're currently reviewing everything and working on a resolution for you.
Hey Saba, I’ll ensure the refund gets processed at the earliest.
I’m really sorry for the inconvenience caused. I’ll remove her right away, please don’t worry about it.
Hi Saba, I'm so sorry for my late response! I was not available this weekend. I'll get this done for you by tomorrow evening. Thank you for your patience!
My card has been charged again!!! I'm so upset, coz I requested many times to close my account
Please refund the amount, or I will file a dispute with my bank
Can you do it asap please Thank you
Hi kanak, can you please remove your group name from my business profile at google as business owner? I am the owner of the busness but it shows me as manager?
